title: [Internal Account Manager for a Foreign-affiliated Company] Operations Manager creating the best dining experience in the office of a foreign financial company
company: コンパスグループ・ジャパン株式会社
description: コンパスグループ・ジャパン株式会社 [Internal Account Manager for a Foreign-affiliated Company] Operations Manager creating the best dining experience in the office of a foreign financial company. Asia Japan Tokyo Chiyoda / Experience welcome / 正社員. Skills: Account Management, Operations, Management, Hospitality. This is an account management position within a major foreign financial institution! You will have a deep understanding of the client's business and make proposals and negotiations at an executive level. You will also be a leader who can unite diverse stakeholders and manage the organization and operations with a high level of expertise.
rawText: [Internal Account Manager for a Foreign-affiliated Company] Operations Manager creating the best dining experience in the office of a foreign financial company : コンパスグループ・ジャパン株式会社 : Find jobs in Japan on Daijob.com Search My Page Scout Expat Career Guide Career Fair For Employers Login/Register 日本語 Login/Register 日本語 HOME Search Scout Expat Career Guide Working Abroad Career Fair About Us Terms of Use Privacy Policy Site Map FAQ Contact Us For Employers Japan's No1 job site for multilinguals・Job Details 「Daijob.com] TOP Other・Jobs in Japan search results コンパスグループ・ジャパン株式会社・Company profile TOP コンパスグループ・ジャパン株式会社・Jobs list Job details Job Details HOT Updated 2026-05-13 Activated 2026-05-13 コンパスグループ・ジャパン株式会社 Company Information Job List Employer Executive Level More Than 120 Days off per Year New Year's Holidays Five Days Workweek Language Skills English Language Skills Major Company Urgent Hiring Experience Welcome [Internal Account Manager for a Foreign-affiliated Company] Operations Manager creating the best dining experience in the office of a foreign financial company Company Name コンパスグループ・ジャパン株式会社 Job Type Executive - Country Manager Hospitality Business Specialists - Restaurant Hospitality Business Specialists - Manager/Supervisor Industry Other Location Asia Japan Tokyo Chiyoda Job Description This is an account management position within a major foreign financial institution! You will have a deep understanding of the client's business and make proposals and negotiations at an executive level. You will also be a leader who can unite diverse stakeholders and manage the organization and operations with a high level of expertise. You will also be involved in organizational development, such as team building and nurturing next-generation leaders, so this is an important position requiring a wide range of operational management skills. [Operational Services] ・Grab & Go ・Cafe ・Catering services ・Reception ・Internal event coordination, etc. *Grab & Go: A pantry service that provides drinks, cereal, fruit, etc. in the company's refreshment space. [Specific Duties] ・Client proposals, participation in management meetings ・Stakeholder management ・Reporting to executives ・Team management ・Event management planning, etc. [Team Members] Approximately 40-50 people (including full-time and part-time staff) [Career Path] We hope you will eventually pursue the position of division manager or executive officer. Company Info お客様をもっとも幸せにするフードサービスカンパニー 私たちは食のプロとして、食が持つ可能性を信じ、お客様の幸せを第一に考え、１食１食を通じてお客様の毎日を支え続けます。 私たちコンパスグループ・ジャパンは、世界45カ国でコントラクトフードサービスを展開するコンパスグループの一員です。全国約２万人の従業員が様々なシーンで食をご提供していますが、目的はただ一つ「食べる人の幸せ」です。食とは、活力を生み、成長を促し、命を支える、人間にとって根源的な存在です。私たちは、食の持つ可能性を信じ、フードサービスのプロとして創意工夫を重ねてきました。そして、長年蓄積してきた技術・知見と、グローバルでのノウハウとを掛け合わせて実現できる高い価値提供こそ、コンパスグループ・ジャパンの強みです。 変化の激しい時代・社会だからこそ、お客様の真のニーズをしっかりと理解し、挑戦を恐れず「食で、世界をいい方へ。」を従業員一丸となって実践してまいります。 Working Hours 9:00～18：00（休憩60分） Job Requirements [Experience and Skills Required for Application] ● Business team management experience ● Client negotiation experience from a management perspective ● English skills (business level) ● Computer skills (Word, Excel, PowerPoint: email and presentation materials, report writing, etc.) [Experience] ● Service or management experience in the hospitality, hotel, restaurant, food and beverage, or retail industries English Level Business Conversation Level (TOEIC 735-860) Japanese Level Fluent(JLPT Level 1 or N1) Salary JPY - Japanese Yen JPY 7000K - JPY 12000K Other Salary Description [Expected Annual Salary] 7-12 million yen Monthly salary of 450,000-850,000 yen x 12 months + bonus (estimated 2 months' salary per year) *Probationary period (3 months; salary and benefits will remain the same during this period) [Benefits, Employee Benefits, and Allowances] Comprehensive social insurance coverage Retirement age: 65 Retirement benefits (defined contribution pension) Union-based mentoring system Mutual aid association membership (preferential use of accommodations, theme parks, amusement parks, and sports clubs nationwide, employee savings plan, various mutual aid benefits, and group insurance), etc. Half-day paid leave system e-learning system Certification acquisition support courses Full transportation expenses reimbursed (subject to regulations) Holidays 土日祝休み 年間休日120日（公休108日＋年間特別休暇12日） 年次有給休暇（入社半年後、初年度10日付与） 慶弔休暇 産前産後育児休暇 介護休暇 Job Contract Period 正社員 Nearest Station 東京都千代田区大手町１−９−７サウスタワー 各線大手町駅 徒歩1分 JR東京駅 7分 Like Apply You will now be redirected to an external site.
